heading: AP Police launched GRP Website!
newsTitle: Andhra Pradesh Police has launched the officila Government Railways Police Website.
newsSummary: The DGP Sri K. Harish Kumar Gupta, I.P.S., has officially launched Goverment Railway Police website on Saturday at AP Police Headquarters along with  other Police dignitaries.

heading: DAILY NEWS UPDATE
newsSummary: Major cities worldwide are embracing innovative technologies and renewable energy solutions to combat climate change. New initiatives focus on green transportation, efficient grid systems, and sustainable urban planning to create eco-friendly environments for future generations. Experts highlight significant progress in reducing emissions through smart city integrations and international collaboration.
